command: node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs config-set workflow._auto_chain_active true 2>&1
INIT=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$INIT" == @file:* ]]; then INIT=$(cat "${INIT#@file:}"); fi; echo "$INIT"
pwd && echo "---" && ls .planning/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No .planning in cwd" && echo "---" && ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/ 2>/dev/null
INIT=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>/dev/null); echo "$INIT"

node -e "const path = require('path'); console.log('cwd:', process.cwd()); const fs = require('fs'); console.log('.planning exists:', fs.existsSync('.planning')); console.log('.planning/ROADMAP.md exists:', fs.existsSync('.planning/ROADMAP.md'));"
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op --cwd /c/Code/MultiRotter 2>/dev/null
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>&1
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap analyze 2>&1 | head -30

# The tool is looking for ROADMAP.md at C:\Code, not C:\Code\MultiRotter
# Check if there's a .planning at C:\Code level
ls /c/Code/.planning/ 2>/dev/null && echo "FOUND at C:/Code" || echo "NOT at C:/Code"
echo "---"
# Check git config for the tool
git config --list | grep -i plan 2>/dev/null || echo "no plan config"
ls -la /c/Code/.planning/

# First check what's in the current MultiRotter .planning vs what the tool expects
ls -la /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/ && echo "===" && cat /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/config.json && echo "===" && ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/phases/

# Check the stale C:\Code\.planning that's confusing the tool
cat /c/Code/.planning/config.json

# Back up the stale one, then remove it
mv /c/Code/.planning /c/Code/.planning-backup-stale && echo "Moved stale .planning to .planning-backup-stale"

# Now test if gsd-tools resolves correctly
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>&1
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap analyze 2>&1 | head -60

ROADMAP=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap analyze 2>/dev/null); echo "$ROADMAP" | grep -c '"number"' && echo "phases found" && echo "$ROADMAP" | grep '"disk_status"' | grep -v complete

# Initialize
INIT=$(node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>/dev/null)
echo "$INIT"

# Check lockfile
LOCKFILE="/c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous.lock"
if [ -f "$LOCKFILE" ]; then
  LOCK_PID=$(cat "$LOCKFILE" 2>/dev/null)
  if kill -0 "$LOCK_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "LOCKED:$LOCK_PID"
  else
    echo "STALE:$LOCK_PID"
    rm -f "$LOCKFILE"
  fi
else
  echo "NO_LOCK"
fi
echo $$ > "$LOCKFILE"
git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>&1

# Check if there's a stale .planning in C:\Code again
ls -la /c/Code/.planning/ 2>/dev/null && echo "STALE EXISTS" || echo "CLEAN"
# Also check the backup
ls -la /c/Code/.planning-backup-stale/ 2>/dev/null | head -3

# Move the stale .planning out of the way (again)
mv /c/Code/.planning /c/Code/.planning-backup-stale-2 && echo "Moved" && \
# Verify MultiRotter is now the resolved root
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init milestone-op 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"project_root|phase_count|completed_phases|roadmap_exists"'
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap analyze 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"number"|"name"|"disk_status"|"roadmap_complete"'

# Set mode and auto_advance
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs config-set mode yolo 2>/dev/null && \
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs config-set workflow.auto_advance true 2>/dev/null && \
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs config-set workflow._auto_chain_active true 2>/dev/null && \
# Save original mode
echo "yolo" > /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-original-mode.tmp && \
# Init session counter
echo "0" > /c/Code/MultiRotter/.planning/.autonomous-s

# Pre-flight checks
gh auth status 2>&1 | head -3 && echo "---" && git ls-remote origin HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo "---" && which timeout 2>/dev/null && echo "timeout OK" || echo "timeout MISSING"

# Check if there's any actual source code
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/src/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO SRC" && \
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/app/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO APP" && \
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/package.json 2>/dev/null || echo "NO PACKAGE.JSON" && \
ls /c/Code/MultiRotter/next.config* 2>/dev/null || echo "NO NEXT CONFIG"

# Quick inventory of existing source
find /c/Code/MultiRotter/src -type f -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | head -40 && echo "---" && find /c/Code/MultiRotter/src -type d 2>/dev/null | head -20

# Check what builds
npx next build 2>&1 | tail -20
npx next build --webpack 2>&1 | tail -30

# Get phase 6 details
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs roadmap get-phase 6 2>/dev/null

# Get phase 6 init state
node ~/.claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs init phase-op 6 2>/dev/null
